import string
import io
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_to_end()
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
  mut sums: List<Int> = []
  mut total = 0
  for tok in tokens
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      total = total + n
      sums = list.push(sums, total)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for s in sums
    if first
      out = "#{s}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{s}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
